Test Case Description: Verify user can login with valid email and password
Preconditions: User account exists and application is reachable
Steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click login

Test Case Description: Verify user can select existing business United from business list
Preconditions: User is logged in and business list is loaded
Steps:
1. Click Businesses menu
2. Select business United
Expected Result: United business is opened and dashboard loads

Test Case Description: Verify user can open Execution menu and see Priorities option
Verify user can open Priorities section from Execution menu
Preconditions: Execution menu open and Priorities option visible
Expected Result: Priorities page opens with priority cards visible

Test Case Description: Verify user can select the first available priority checkbox
Preconditions: Priorities page displayed with at least one priority

Test Case Description: Verify Kickstart Projects button works after a priority is selected
Preconditions: At least one priority checkbox is selected
Expected Result: Collaborator warning popup appears or project kickstart flows

Test Case Description: Verify Add Collaborators First option is shown on warning popup
Preconditions: Kickstart Projects clicked for business without collaborators
Steps:
1. Click Kickstart Projects
2. Select Add Collaborators First

Test Case Description: Verify Add Collaborators page displays after selecting Add Collaborators First
Verify Kickstart to Projects option works and opens Projects page or success popup
Expected Result: Projects page or success popup appears

Test Case Description: Verify second priority kickstart does not show warning popup if collaborators already added
Preconditions: Business has collaborators added after first kickstart
Steps:
1. Open Priorities
2. Select another priority
3. Click Kickstart Projects

Test Case Description: Verify application rejects invalid login credentials
Steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter invalid email or password
3. Click login
Expected Result: Login fails and error message displays

Test Case Description: Verify error is handled when selected business does not exist
Steps: 1. Attempt to select a non-existent business from list
Expected Result: System reports business not found or test fails gracefully

Test Case Description: Verify behavior when no priorities exist for a business
Preconditions: Business dashboard open and no priorities are available
Expected Result: User sees a no priorities message or action is disabled

Test Case Description: Verify Kickstart Projects cannot run without selecting a priority
Preconditions: Priorities page open with priorities visible
Steps:
1. Do not select any priority
2. Click Kickstart Projects
Expected Result: Kickstart Projects button is disabled or warning appears

Test Case Description: Verify system handles when collaborator warning popup options are missing
Steps:
1. Click Kickstart Projects
2. Check popup buttons
Expected Result: System handles missing options gracefully or reports error

Test Case Description: Verify business list retains selection after refresh or reopen
Steps:
1. Select a business
2. Refresh page or reopen list
Expected Result: Selected business remains active or list reloads correctly

Test Case Description: Verify selected priority remains checked after page refresh
Steps:
1. Refresh page
2. Check selected priority state
Expected Result: Priority remains selected or user is warned to reselect

Test Case Description: Verify warning popup can be dismissed without action
Expected Result: Popup closes and user stays on Priorities page
